global.description: The ad features a modern blue background with promotional text and graphics.
global.main_message: Promoting weekend travel deals at a low price.

elements.label: Blue abstract background
elements.description: A smooth blue background with abstract shapes creating a modern and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Central graphic elements
elements.description: A large circular and rectangular shape in the center, both filled with a lighter shade of blue, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned slightly above the central graphic, maintaining the blue color theme.

elements.label: Another graphic element
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape positioned below the central graphic, also in a lighter blue tone.

elements.label: Top left decorative element
elements.description: A small blue shape located at the top left corner, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Central decorative element
elements.description: A small graphic element positioned in the center, adding visual interest to the layout.

elements.label: NomadLaye logo
elements.description: The text 'NomadLaye' in bold, large font at the top of the ad, prominently displayed against the blue background.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: The text 'Escape this weekend Special fares today' in a clean, modern font, centered below the logo.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold '$4.99 Try for free' text in a circular button format, positioned at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the promotional message in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
